block.name: Hero
block.text:
Enjoy hassle-free printing with the HP All-In Plan

Plans include new HP printer, ink delivery with optional paper, continuous coverage, starting at $7.99/month with no upfront cost, 30-day risk-free trial, and included shipping.

Get started

item_0.title: Get a new printer plus upgrades
item_0.description: Choose from trusted HP printers. Upgrade every 2-3 years at no upfront cost.

item_1.title: Experience flexible printing plans
item_1.description: Unused pages roll over monthly (up to 3x limit). Adjust plans anytime.

item_2.title: Never worry about running out of ink
item_2.description: Automatic delivery when low. Free delivery included.

item_3.title: Enjoy continuous printer coverage
item_3.description: Next-business-day replacement if unfixable. 24/7 support at no extra cost.

item_0.imageAlt: HP All-In Plan Basic - HP Envy
item_0.title: Basic

item_1.imageAlt: HP All-In Plan Versatile - HP Envy Photo
item_1.title: Versatile
item_1.specs:
HP Envy Photo

  • $9.99/month
  • 20 pages included
  • 2-year commitment
  • Automatic ink delivery

item_2.imageAlt: HP All-In Plan High Volume - HP Smart Tank
item_2.title: High-volume
item_2.specs:
HP Smart Tank

  • $12.99/month
  • 100 pages included
  • 3-year commitment
  • Automatic ink delivery

item_3.imageAlt: HP All-In Plan Professional - HP OfficeJet Pro
item_3.title: Professional
item_3.specs:
HP OfficeJet Pro

  • $14.99/month
  • 50 pages included
  • 2-year commitment
  • Automatic ink delivery

item_0.name: Accordion Item
item_0.summary: What is the HP All-In Plan?
item_0.text: A subscription service delivering printer, automatic ink, optional paper delivery, and 24/7 support for one monthly payment. Includes next-business-day replacement for unfixable issues at no cost.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.text: Yes, with automatic ink and optional paper delivery in a single monthly payment.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.summary: Do I access all benefits during trial?
item_2.text: Yes, 30-day risk-free trial with no upfront costs. Return printer and supplies within 10 days using prepaid label to avoid unreturned printer fee.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.summary: Where can I manage my plan?
item_3.text: Through the "My Account" page. Adjust monthly printing amounts anytime; changes take effect next billing cycle.

item_4.name: Accordion Item
item_4.summary: Can I cancel after the 30-day trial?
item_4.text: Yes, anytime via dashboard or 1-888-447-0148. Cancellation ends printing ability; printer and supplies must be returned. Early cancellation fees apply after 30 days within commitment period.
